hero.badge: ✨ The first debt management platform in the Arab market
hero.desc: SADAD platform helps you track your customers' debts, send smart WhatsApp reminders, and schedule installments — all in one place.

features.title: Everything your store needs to manage debts
features.desc: From tracking to collection — all receivables management tools in one place.
features.f1Desc: Keep complete profiles for each customer including debts, credit history, and contacts.
features.f2Desc: Send automated payment reminders via WhatsApp or SMS without embarrassment.
features.f3Desc: Visual analytics to show collection rates and overdue debts for better decisions.
features.f4Desc: Split any amount into regular installments and the system auto-tracks payments.
features.f5Desc: Get detailed statements for any customer ready to print or share instantly.
features.f6Desc: Organize financial associations among friends or staff and track turns.

howItWorks.title: Start in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.s1d: Register your store in 2 minutes — no credit card needed, start for free immediately.
howItWorks.s2d: Enter customer info, due amounts, and installment plans in quick simple steps.
howItWorks.s3d: Monitor progress, send WA alerts to late payers, and get statements in one click.

pricing.title: Plans for Every Merchant
pricing.desc: Start free, and upgrade as your store grows.

hero.desc: **SADAD** helps you track customer debts, collect installments, and send automatic WhatsApp reminders to ensure your cash flow and business growth.

features.title: Everything you need for successful financial management
features.desc: We designed SADAD to be the perfect partner for merchants and small business owners to manage their receivables.
features.f1Desc: Organize customer data and financial history in one place with ease.
features.f2Desc: Send professional reminder messages to your customers about due dates with one click to follow up effectively.
features.f3Desc: Schedule debts and track due, remaining, and paid amounts with high accuracy.
features.f4Desc: Link debts to guarantors to reduce risk and protect legal and financial rights.
features.f5Desc: Issue precise and detailed account statements for each customer to share and ensure transparency.
features.f6Desc: Accurate and comprehensive graphical reports on cash flow, overdue, and active debts.

howItWorks.title: Three simple steps to start your success journey
howItWorks.s1d: Create an account for your store and start adding your customers' data.
howItWorks.s2d: Record the amounts owed and schedule installments according to your agreement.
howItWorks.s3d: Track collections and send reminders with one click via WhatsApp.

pricing.title: Choose the right plan for your business growth
pricing.desc: Flexible plans starting with a free trial to suit all store sizes and business activities.
